resource_role: Literature metadata, abstracts, preprints, and publication identifiers

records.title: TP53 mutation landscape and patient survival in oral squamous cell carcinoma.
records.authorString: Ichikawa M, Kondo Y, Carreras J, Sasaki M, Nagase S, Hoshimoto Y, Tamura M, Uchibori M, Aoki T, Nakamura N, Masugi Y, Ota Y.

evidence_boundary.can_support: Traceable literature metadata and abstract-level source discovery.
evidence_boundary.cannot_support: Full-paper methods/results quality, peer-review status, mechanism, or clinical efficacy unless source text is inspected.
evidence_boundary.privacy_or_access: Public metadata request only. Do not submit private manuscript text, patient data, PHI, or unpublished data.
evidence_boundary.handoff: Use this packet as Reef resource evidence for Iceberg, Anchor, or Compass. Do not treat it as primary experimental validation.
